headline: Will AbbVie's Oncology Franchise Remain Under Pressure in Q2?
summary: ABBV's Q2 oncology revenues may edge lower as Imbruvica weakness outweighs gains from Venclexta and newer cancer therapies.

headline: LLY Has Momentum. The Question Is The Price
summary: A pharmaceutical giant is on an incredible run fueled by blockbuster drugs, forcing investors to ask if the price of admission already accounts for the entire victory lap.

headline: Will Keytruda Remain the Driving Force Behind Merck's Q2 Performance?
summary: Keytruda is expected to drive another strong quarter for MRK, with investors watching Q2 sales and management's outlook ahead of the drug's 2028 patent expiry.

headline: Gilead (GILD) Will Bring New HIV Data And A Merck Regimen To AIDS 2026
summary: Gilead Sciences plans to present new HIV research data at AIDS 2026. The presentations will include long term efficacy and safety results from lenacapavir. Gilead will also share data on a novel HIV treatment regimen developed with Merck. For investors following Gilead Sciences, NasdaqGS:GILD, the announcement connects directly to how the market views the company’s HIV portfolio. The stock recently closed at $130.28, with a return of 7.1% year to date and 21.3% over the past year. Over a 5...
